calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-19-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-19-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Phil Kilduff Esq. Special Appearance for Plaintiff: Household Finance Corp of California.
No appearance by the Defendant: Michael Kearney aka Mike Cearney.
Exhibit 1 - Declaration of Plaintiff in lieu of personal testimony at trial of Mineva Paron---------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Principal of $12,271.76
Prejudgment Interest $2,492.09
Attorney's Fees of $1,825.00
Costs $338.50, for a Total of $16,927.35
Plaintiff stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2005 Set For Trial On Dec-19-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
